title: Booja - Booja, Hazelnut Crunch Chocolate Truffle Loglets 115g
features: 10 Indulgent Hazelnut Chocolate Truffle Loglets: Sweetly roasted hazelnut truffle delights, elegantly rolled in rich chocolate flakes. Perfect for elegant nibbling and indulgent moments.
A Thoughtful Gift of Chocolate Elegance: Beautifully presented and irresistibly smooth, these truffle loglets make the perfect gift for birthdays, celebrations, or simply to share a little luxury.
Certified Organic & Free-From friendly: Free from dairy, gluten, and soya. Made with minimal, high-quality ingredients. Perfect for those who seek exquisite chocolate without compromise.
Vegan & Palm Oil-Free: Elegantly simple and consciously crafted to be enjoyed by all. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians, and coeliacs. No palm oil or artificial additives.
Made in Norfolk, England: Craft and packed with care at our Booja-Booja HQ to ensure exceptional quality and flavour in every pack.
description: Product Description Discover the joys of vegan chocolate Delicious multi award-winning* chocolate truffles and truffle loglets: handmade with the finest organic ingredients to create moments of melt-in-the-mouth delight. *We're certified by The Vegan Society 2023 and The Soil Association 2023. So far this year we've won 5 awards for our chocolate truffles, from The Great Taste Awards 2023, Free From Food Awards 2023 and Nourish Vegan Awards 2023. In total, we've won 174 awards (and counting) across our product range. A little more about us... Booja - Booja offers you delicious moments of beautifully sweet pleasure that help brighten the faces of friends and loved ones... and to occasionally quietly enjoy on your own. Using the minimal number of simple organic ingredients, we've been making delightful chocolate truffles in Norfolk since 1999. With many awards* for taste and quality, it's easy to see why we have quickly developed an enthusiastic following. All of our delicious products are dairy, gluten and soya free. They're also palm oil-free. Suitable for vegans, vegetarians and coeliacs. Chocolate Truffle Loget Range 115g Scrumptious truffle loglets featured in our Chocolate Loglet Range... *NEW* Hazelnut Crunch Loglet Melt in the mouth sweetly roasted hazelnut delights, rolled in chocolate flakes. *NEW* Salted Caramel Mocha Loglet Chocolate mocha with salty little chews of caramel, coated in chocolate flakes. *NEW* Chocolate Orange Loglet Juicy little bursts of mandarin surprises, rolled in chocolate flakes. *NEW* Yuletide Spice Loglet Cranberry nut ganache and a winter warming ginger linger, coated in cocoa powder.
